markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on a new content strategy focused on driving bookings.](https://fathom.video/share/_Gi63FFtj6YjzKiGFz7VqWfUv3m5Wzjy?tab=summary&timestamp=315.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Strategy:** Shift from awareness to driving bookings by targeting bottom-of-funnel topics and adding contextual CTAs to content.](https://fathom.video/share/_Gi63FFtj6YjzKiGFz7VqWfUv3m5Wzjy?tab=summary&timestamp=315.0)
  - [**Strong Organic Growth:** Organic revenue grew \~17% across all destinations, with AI search revenue skyrocketing from $9k to $119k, validating the strategy's foundation.](https://fathom.video/share/_Gi63FFtj6YjzKiGFz7VqWfUv3m5Wzjy?tab=summary&timestamp=984.0)
  - [**Technical Foundation:** A new Sanity CMS component for dynamic banners will be developed to enable scalable, contextual CTAs across the 300+ blog posts.](https://fathom.video/share/_Gi63FFtj6YjzKiGFz7VqWfUv3m5Wzjy?tab=summary&timestamp=700.0)
  - [**Immediate Actions:** Saul will provide a 2026 promo calendar and updated tour list to inform topic selection; GrowthX will recommend banner placements for the top 5 blogs per destination.](https://fathom.video/share/_Gi63FFtj6YjzKiGFz7VqWfUv3m5Wzjy?tab=summary&timestamp=560.0)

## Topics

### Performance & Strategic Shift

  - [**2025 Performance:** Organic traffic grew \~53%, but revenue growth was only \~17%.](https://fathom.video/share/_Gi63FFtj6YjzKiGFz7VqWfUv3m5Wzjy?tab=summary&timestamp=984.0)
      - [**Insight:** This traffic-to-revenue gap is the primary driver for the strategic shift from awareness to conversion.](https://fathom.video/share/_Gi63FFtj6YjzKiGFz7VqWfUv3m5Wzjy?tab=summary&timestamp=984.0)
  - [**AI Search Revenue:** A key success metric, growing from $9k in 2024 to $119k in 2025.](https://fathom.video/share/_Gi63FFtj6YjzKiGFz7VqWfUv3m5Wzjy?tab=summary&timestamp=1037.0)
      - [**Driver:** A combination of long-tail content and technical SEO improvements (schemas, hierarchy).](https://fathom.video/share/_Gi63FFtj6YjzKiGFz7VqWfUv3m5Wzjy?tab=summary&timestamp=1037.0)
  - [**2025 Promotion Impact:**](https://fathom.video/share/_Gi63FFtj6YjzKiGFz7VqWfUv3m5Wzjy?tab=summary&timestamp=497.0)
      - [**General:** Promos typically boost bookings 10–15%.](https://fathom.video/share/_Gi63FFtj6YjzKiGFz7VqWfUv3m5Wzjy?tab=summary&timestamp=497.0)
      - [**Black Friday:** A notable exception, with a 15–17% drop in bookings across all destinations.](https://fathom.video/share/_Gi63FFtj6YjzKiGFz7VqWfUv3m5Wzjy?tab=summary&timestamp=497.0)
  - [**New Strategy Focus:**](https://fathom.video/share/_Gi63FFtj6YjzKiGFz7VqWfUv3m5Wzjy?tab=summary&timestamp=315.0)
      - [**Goal:** Drive bookings by targeting bottom-of-funnel, evaluation-stage topics.](https://fathom.video/share/_Gi63FFtj6YjzKiGFz7VqWfUv3m5Wzjy?tab=summary&timestamp=315.0)
      - [**Enabler:** Saul will provide a 2026 promo calendar and an updated tour list to inform topic selection.](https://fathom.video/share/_Gi63FFtj6YjzKiGFz7VqWfUv3m5Wzjy?tab=summary&timestamp=560.0)

### Implementing Contextual Banners

  - [**Goal:** Increase conversions by adding contextual CTAs (banners) to blog posts.](https://fathom.video/share/_Gi63FFtj6YjzKiGFz7VqWfUv3m5Wzjy?tab=summary&timestamp=700.0)
  - [**Technical Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/_Gi63FFtj6YjzKiGFz7VqWfUv3m5Wzjy?tab=summary&timestamp=700.0)
      - [**Long-term:** Saul and Oscar (IT) will develop a reusable banner component in the Sanity CMS.](https://fathom.video/share/_Gi63FFtj6YjzKiGFz7VqWfUv3m5Wzjy?tab=summary&timestamp=700.0)
          - [**Rationale:** This enables scalable management of CTAs across the 300+ blog posts.](https://fathom.video/share/_Gi63FFtj6YjzKiGFz7VqWfUv3m5Wzjy?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)
      - [**Short-term:** Manually add static banners to the top 5 blogs per destination to test performance.](https://fathom.video/share/_Gi63FFtj6YjzKiGFz7VqWfUv3m5Wzjy?tab=summary&timestamp=748.0)
  - [**GrowthX Role:** Recommend the top 5 blogs per destination and suggest specific banner placements and links (e.g., tour pages, category pages).](https://fathom.video/share/_Gi63FFtj6YjzKiGFz7VqWfUv3m5Wzjy?tab=summary&timestamp=801.0)

### Partnership & Workflow

  - [**Relationship:** Rated 5/5.](https://fathom.video/share/_Gi63FFtj6YjzKiGFz7VqWfUv3m5Wzjy?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Strong collaboration, effective AI tool onboarding, and positive organic revenue results.](https://fathom.video/share/_Gi63FFtj6YjzKiGFz7VqWfUv3m5Wzjy?tab=summary&timestamp=921.0)
  - [**Workflow:**](https://fathom.video/share/_Gi63FFtj6YjzKiGFz7VqWfUv3m5Wzjy?tab=summary&timestamp=1266.0)
      - [**Content Strategy:** Isabel Luna (Vallarta Adventures) reviews high-level strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/_Gi63FFtj6YjzKiGFz7VqWfUv3m5Wzjy?tab=summary&timestamp=1266.0)
      - [**Content Execution:** Lucero (Vallarta Adventures) reviews, approves, and publishes all articles.](https://fathom.video/share/_Gi63FFtj6YjzKiGFz7VqWfUv3m5Wzjy?tab=summary&timestamp=1266.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Saul Sanz:**](https://fathom.video/share/_Gi63FFtj6YjzKiGFz7VqWfUv3m5Wzjy?tab=summary&timestamp=560.0)
      - [Review the GrowthX strategy file by this weekend.](https://fathom.video/share/_Gi63FFtj6YjzKiGFz7VqWfUv3m5Wzjy?tab=summary&timestamp=251.0)
      - [Provide the 2026 promotional calendar and an updated tour list.](https://fathom.video/share/_Gi63FFtj6YjzKiGFz7VqWfUv3m5Wzjy?tab=summary&timestamp=560.0)
      - [Begin wireframing the new blog page layout with Oscar (IT).](https://fathom.video/share/_Gi63FFtj6YjzKiGFz7VqWfUv3m5Wzjy?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/_Gi63FFtj6YjzKiGFz7VqWfUv3m5Wzjy?tab=summary&timestamp=801.0)
      - [Recommend the top 5 blogs per destination for manual banner testing.](https://fathom.video/share/_Gi63FFtj6YjzKiGFz7VqWfUv3m5Wzjy?tab=summary&timestamp=801.0)
      - [Suggest specific banner placements and linking strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/_Gi63FFtj6YjzKiGFz7VqWfUv3m5Wzjy?tab=summary&timestamp=801.0)
      - [Send the agenda doc, performance report, and new strategy link.](https://fathom.video/share/_Gi63FFtj6YjzKiGFz7VqWfUv3m5Wzjy?tab=summary&timestamp=671.0)
